title: Reduce cyclomatic complexity
description: Function has high cyclomatic complexity. Refactor into smaller, focused functions with single responsibilities.

title: Reduce nesting depth with guard clauses
description: Deeply nested code is harder to read. Use early returns and guard clauses to flatten control flow.

title: Extract duplicated code into shared utilities
description: Duplicated code increases maintenance cost and bug risk. Extract common logic into reusable modules.

title: Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection
description: String concatenation in SQL queries allows injection attacks. Always use parameterized queries or prepared statements.

title: Replace eval() with safer alternatives
description: eval() executes arbitrary code and is a critical security risk. Use JSON.parse for data or Function constructor only when absolutely necessary.

title: Move secrets to environment variables or a secrets manager
description: Hardcoded credentials in source code can be exposed through version control. Use environment variables or AWS Secrets Manager.

title: Add structured error handling
description: Unhandled errors can crash the application or expose sensitive information. Add try/catch blocks with proper error types and logging.

title: Add input validation with schema libraries
description: Unvalidated input can lead to injection attacks, crashes, and data corruption. Use Zod or Joi for runtime validation.

title: Enforce HTTPS/TLS for all connections
description: HTTP traffic can be intercepted. Enforce TLS for all external communications and redirect HTTP to HTTPS.

title: Implement rate limiting to prevent abuse
description: Without rate limiting, APIs are vulnerable to brute force attacks and denial of service. Add throttling per client.

title: Add security headers with helmet middleware
description: Missing security headers leave the application vulnerable to clickjacking, XSS, and MIME-sniffing attacks.

title: Add structured logging and monitoring
description: Without logging, debugging production issues is extremely difficult. Add structured logging with context and severity levels.

title: Add unit tests for critical paths
description: Untested code is a liability during refactoring and deployments. Add tests for business logic, edge cases, and error paths.

title: Add a CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
description: Manual deployments are error-prone. Automate testing, linting, and deployment with a CI/CD pipeline.
example:
# .github/workflows/ci.yml
name: CI
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npm test
      - run: npm run lint

title: Add documentation with JSDoc and README
description: Undocumented code slows down onboarding and increases the chance of misuse. Add JSDoc comments for public APIs and a comprehensive README.
